production.summary: Innophos has introduced a new formulation designed to help manufacturers develop dog biscuits that support digestive health and overall wellness while enabling effective mineral fortification.
production.facility_or_line: Not specified (implies existing ingredient production lines)
production.why_it_matters: The introduction of new product formulations often necessitates the procurement of new raw materials, specialized reagents for quality control, and potentially new lab equipment for product development and testing.

ai_summary: Innophos launched a new dog biscuit formulation for digestive health and mineral fortification, indicating active R&D in functional pet nutrition. This matters for lab supply sales as it suggests increased demand for analytical equipment, reagents, and consumables. Their R&D and QC labs will require tools for nutritional analysis, mineral testing, and quality control to support this new product development.
